creator: gustavo.scalet@collabora.com
text:
(In reply to Glen Barber from comment #6)
Convenience for the users. Most of the scripts that we use at the moment is using python2 but there is nothing blocking us from using python3 (despite rhel-6 actually, which is one of the distros that I want to give support but only has python-2.6)

Other users will have different requirements and if StartupScript is used with a python3 script, it'll face the same issues  I did.

Do you see any problems by providing these conveniences by default on GCE?
